summary: Iteration 15 - Restructure validation. 12/12 backend tests PASSED. Frontend login, sidebar (no Plantas), /plantas redirect, /setores, /ativos, Novo Ativo modal (no Planta dropdown), /os Kanban, and Nova OS modal (6 new tipos + Disciplina field with 5 options) all work as expected. Two dashboard issues found: (1) new charts os-por-setor/os-por-disciplina/ativos-mais-falhas are NOT rendered on Dashboard despite backend endpoints existing; (2) old 'Distribuição de OS por Tipo' chart still shows legacy tipo names.

ui_bugs.issue: Missing 3 new charts required by problem statement: 'OS por Setor', 'OS por Disciplina', 'Ativos com Mais Falhas'. Backend endpoints /api/dashboard/os-por-setor, /os-por-disciplina, /ativos-mais-falhas exist and return data, but the Dashboard UI does not render them.

ui_bugs.component: DashboardPage - Distribuição de OS por Tipo chart
ui_bugs.issue: Bar chart still uses LEGACY tipos (Corretiva, Preventiva, Preditiva, Emergência) instead of the new 6 OSTipo values (lubrificacao, limpeza_organizacao, preventiva, corretiva, preparacao_material, fabricacao_melhorias). 'Preditiva' and 'Emergência' are no longer valid tipos.
ui_bugs.selector: Distribuição de OS por Tipo BarChart

issues: Recharts console warnings: 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' on initial load — chart container sizing race on first paint.

action_items: Add the 3 new dashboard charts in DashboardPage (App.js): OS por Setor (bar/pie), OS por Disciplina (5 disciplines), Ativos com Mais Falhas (ranked list/table). Backend already serves the data.

Update 'Distribuição de OS por Tipo' chart to use the new 6 OSTipo values (Lubrificação, Limpeza e Organização, Preventiva, Corretiva, Preparação de Material, Fabricação / Melhorias). Currently hardcoded to old enum values.
Optional: fix Recharts ResponsiveContainer initial size warning (set explicit min-width/min-height).
critical_code_review_comments: Backend dashboard.py: /dashboard/os-por-setor uses 'if os_count > 0 or True' (always true) — dead conditional, simplify.
Backend dashboard.py: /dashboard/ativos-mais-falhas does sector lookup per asset (N+1) — batch fetch sectors instead.
frontend App.js is reported ~985 lines for ModalNovaOS alone — file likely exceeds 700 lines limit. Consider splitting into per-page components.
deps.get_scoped_asset_ids return semantics (None vs []) used inconsistently — document or normalize.

success_rate.frontend: 85% — all listed flows work; 2 dashboard gaps vs problem statement

test_credentials: admin@manutrix.com / admin123 (works via Supabase or MongoDB fallback)
seed_data_creation: Used existing seeded data; tests create TEST_-prefixed sectors/OS and clean up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend restructure (no plant_id, sector top-level, disciplina mandatory, 6 new OS tipos) is fully functional and validated by test_iteration15_restructure.py. Remaining work is frontend Dashboard: add 3 new charts and update the legacy OS por Tipo chart to use new enum values. /setores, /ativos, Novo Ativo modal, /os Kanban, and Nova OS modal are all correct.
rca of the issue: Dashboard charts gap: Frontend Dashboard component was not updated when backend added /dashboard/os-por-setor, /os-por-disciplina, /ativos-mais-falhas endpoints. The existing 'Distribuição de OS por Tipo' bar chart is hardcoded with the legacy 4-value tipo list (Corretiva/Preventiva/Preditiva/Emergência) instead of querying /api/ordens-servico/estatisticas (which returns por_tipo with the new 6 keys).
